title: T-010 — MWO state machine Server Actions (request/approve/assign/start/complete/cancel) per V-MNT-01..06
prompt:
# T-010 — MWO state transition Server Actions

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §8.2 (mwo_state_machine_v1), §11.1 (V-MNT-01..06), §11.2 (V-MNT-07..09 LOTO gate), §11.4 (V-MNT-15..17 sanitation gate), §11.6 (V-MNT-22 downtime FK)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement 6 Server Actions enforcing the 6-state MWO machine (`requestMwo`, `approveMwo`, `assignMwo`, `startMwo`, `completeMwo`, `cancelMwo`). Each action validates transition against `mwo_state_machine_v1` rule (loaded from rule_definitions) and §11 V-MNT guards. RBAC enforced via `mnt.mwo.*` perms from T-001.

## Pre-flight
Verify T-001 (perms), T-004 (MWO tables), T-007 (rule registered). Verify Wave1 T-124 e-sign primitive (used by completeMwo for sign-off) and Foundation rule-engine evaluator.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/mwo-state.ts` — 6 Server Actions, each:
   - Authenticates via `auth()`; rejects if no session.
   - Asserts caller has the required `mnt.mwo.*` permission for the transition.
   - Loads current MWO row in a transaction; validates `allowed_from`/`allowed_to` against `mwo_state_machine_v1.definition_yaml`.
   - Enforces V-MNT guards:
     - approveMwo: V-MNT-02 (approver != requester) — block with code `MWO_APPROVER_SAME_AS_REQUESTER`.
     - startMwo: V-MNT-03 (assigned_to NOT NULL, started_at NOT NULL); V-MNT-07 (LOTO required → loto.verified_at NOT NULL); V-MNT-15 (sanitation allergen → first_signed_by AND second_signed_by AND atp_test_result_rlu NOT NULL).
     - completeMwo: V-MNT-04 (actual_duration_min > 0, completion_notes NOT NULL).
     - cancelMwo: V-MNT-05 (cancellation_reason NOT NULL).
   - Updates MWO row with new state + timestamps + actor_user_id.
   - Emits outbox event `mwo.{new_state}` (publisher implemented in T-012; this action only writes the outbox row).
   - Wraps everything in a single DB transaction with `SELECT … FOR UPDATE` on the MWO row.
2. Zod input schemas for each action.
3. Vitest with Testcontainers Postgres covering: each valid transition, each invalid transition is rejected with specific error code, each V-MNT guard fires with expected code, idempotency (re-issuing same transition is rejected with `MWO_INVALID_TRANSITION`), RBAC (caller without `mnt.mwo.approve` is rejected).

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/mwo-state.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/mwo-state.schema.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/__tests__/mwo-state.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a MWO in state='requested', when approveMwo runs with caller having `mnt.mwo.approve` AND approver != requester, then state becomes 'approved' and an outbox row `mwo.approved` is written in the same transaction.
2. Given a MWO in state='approved' with caller being the original requester, when approveMwo runs, then it fails with code `MWO_APPROVER_SAME_AS_REQUESTER` and no state change occurs (V-MNT-02).
3. Given a MWO on equipment.requires_loto=true and mwo_loto_checklists.verified_at IS NULL, when startMwo runs, then it fails with code `MWO_LOTO_NOT_VERIFIED` (V-MNT-07).
4. Given a sanitation MWO with allergen_change_flag=true and missing dual sign-off OR atp_test_result_rlu, when startMwo runs, then it fails with code `MWO_SANITATION_DUAL_SIGNOFF_REQUIRED` (V-MNT-15).
5. Given caller without `mnt.mwo.approve` perm, when approveMwo runs, then it fails with code `PERMISSION_DENIED` and HTTP 403.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest mocking auth() + Testcontainers Postgres; assert all five ACs before code exists.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/__tests__/mwo-state.test.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass the rule_definitions YAML — actions MUST consult `mwo_state_machine_v1.definition_yaml` for allowed_from/allowed_to (workflow-as-data).
- Do not perform transition without SELECT … FOR UPDATE (race condition).
- Do not skip the outbox write — downstream consumers (15-OEE MTBF/MTTR, 09-quality, 12-reporting) depend on `mwo.*` events.
- Do not call `app.current_org_id()` from Drizzle — it is invoked implicitly by RLS; callers must have set context via session middleware.
- Do not include `mnt.loto.*` enforcement here — that is a separate Server Action in T-010 follow-up or a sub-action; this task only checks `verified_at IS NOT NULL` as a guard.

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Actions enforcing 6-state MWO machine + V-MNT-01..06/07/15 guards + RBAC + outbox emission.
pipeline_inputs.details: Workflow-as-data: actions consult rule_definitions.definition_yaml for allowed_from/allowed_to. SELECT FOR UPDATE prevents race. Outbox row written in same transaction.
acceptance_criteria: Given MWO state='requested', when approveMwo runs with caller having mnt.mwo.approve AND approver != requester, then state='approved' and outbox row mwo.approved is written in same txn (foundation T-112 outbox); given caller=original requester, then fails MWO_APPROVER_SAME_AS_REQUESTER (V-MNT-02)

Given MWO on equipment.requires_loto=true and loto.verified_at IS NULL, when startMwo runs, then fails MWO_LOTO_NOT_VERIFIED (V-MNT-07); given sanitation MWO with allergen_change_flag=true and missing dual sign-off or atp_test_result_rlu, then fails MWO_SANITATION_DUAL_SIGNOFF_REQUIRED (V-MNT-15)

Given completeMwo runs, when actual_duration_min > 0 and notes present, then state='completed' and outbox row mwo.completed is written; given cancelMwo with cancellation_reason, then state='cancelled' (V-MNT-04/V-MNT-05)
Given caller without mnt.mwo.approve, when approveMwo runs, then fails PERMISSION_DENIED / 403
test_strategy: RED: vitest mocking auth() + Testcontainers Postgres asserting all five ACs
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass rule_definitions YAML — workflow-as-data
Do not transition without SELECT FOR UPDATE
Do not skip outbox write — downstream consumers depend on mwo.*
Do not implement LOTO apply/clear here (T-015)
Do not call app.current_org_id() from Drizzle — set via session middleware
